aweme_list.desc: This week, Metro Bank customers across the UK reported a major glitch — payments duplicated, balances dropping, and panic spreading online. For many, it wasn’t just about money — it was about trust. Because when your balance disappears, so does your sense of control. #metrobank #bankglitch #bank #marksandspencer #mands #news #bbcnews #commercialbanking #digitaltrust #techfails #moneymatters #financetok #bankingcrisis #realstories #emotionalmarketing #greatbritian #england
